title: Question: podman REST API exec streaming
body:
Hi,
I have not found this information anywhere and I'm not that proficient with Go to read it from source so here's my question:
is it possible to stream output data from command using Podman REST API exec start endpoint (`/libpod/exec/{id}/start`)?
My goal is to update client with live data when executing long command inside container. I wanted to know if it's possible at all before hacking around.

comments.body: Yes this is what we are doing with podman-remote now.
